title: AnalyzerEdgeMapping
description: Schema for edge (relationship) type mappings. Defines how analyzer relationships are mapped to DR predicate relationships from the predicates catalog.

version.description: Optional version identifier for this mapping configuration

field_conventions.description: Optional documentation of field naming conventions and semantics used in this mapping

mappings.description: Array of relationship type mapping definitions

cbm_edge.description: Edge type identifier from CBM analyzer output (UPPERCASE_SNAKE_CASE, e.g., 'HTTP_CALLS', 'HANDLES')

oneOf.description: Null when this relationship cannot be mapped to any DR predicate
Predicate name from spec/schemas/base/predicates.json. Enum is dynamically populated at build time.

dr_relationship.description: DR predicate relationship type or null if unmappable. Valid values are sourced from spec/schemas/base/predicates.json

confidence.description: Mapping confidence level indicating reliability of this mapping

directionality_transform.description: Optional runtime transformation to apply to relationship directionality during mapping. 'invert' reverses the direction, 'bidirectional' treats as two-way, 'symmetric' makes relationship symmetric, null = no transform. This is independent of the 'direction' field, which specifies the inherent directionality of the relationship itself.

usage.description: Edge classification: 'verification_and_mapping' for edges that create DR predicates, 'traversal_only' for edges used for semantic analysis but not directly mapped

dr_scope.description: Optional scope of the relationship (whether it operates within a single layer or across layers)

direction.description: Optional specification of the inherent directionality of the relationship in the source code model (forward = source→target, backward = target→source, bidirectional = both directions, caller_to_callee = from caller to callee). This is independent of 'directionality_transform', which specifies runtime transformations to apply during mapping.

confidence_from_property.description: Optional code property or flag that determines confidence level

dr_pattern.description: Optional pattern description showing typical source and target element types

implementation_note.description: Optional implementation guidance or special handling requirements

description.description: Optional explanation of why this mapping exists or any special conditions

conditions.description: Optional conditions that must be met for this mapping to apply
